english_news.title: U.S. payrolls rose by 172,000 in May, much more than expected; unemployment at 4.3%
english_news.summary: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 80,000 in May while the unemployment rate held at 4.3%.

english_news.title: Alphabet is seeking fresh capital as stock's 4-week losing streak tests investor appetite
english_news.summary: Alphabet expects capex to reach up to $190 billion this year, double last year's spending, and the company is turning to investors to help fund its expansion.

english_news.title: Boeing to start 737 Max production on new assembly line July 6, CEO says
english_news.summary: The new 737 Max final assembly line in Everett, Washington, will serve as a catalyst for increasing Max production to 52 jets per month.

english_news.title: Lululemon cuts annual outlook, citing 'negative' media commentary and disappointing product launches
english_news.summary: Lululemon is expecting its situation to get a lot worse before it gets better, as it issued weak guidance for the full year.

english_news.title: No tech, no problem. Dow makes record and traders think these stocks can lead now
english_news.summary: Traders bought about 5,300 calls in the State Street Health Care Select Sector SPDR ETF (XLV) on Thursday, compared to just over 1,000 puts, according to data from ThinkOrSwim.

english_news.title: AI is designing OpenAI's next model in a sign of 'superintelligence': SoftBank's Masayoshi Son to CNBC
english_news.summary: SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son said his forecast of artificial superintelligence arriving in 10 years was "conservative" and thinks it will be here sooner.

english_news.title: Amazon unveils latest warehouse robot as tech giants continue AI layoffs
english_news.summary: "Our experience of robots is that it's actually driven up employment rather than the reverse," Amazon executive John Boumphrey told CNBC.

english_news.title: LinkedIn co-founder Reid Hoffman is leaving Microsoft's board after almost a decade
english_news.summary: Reid Hoffman was one of OpenAI's first donors, and he left its board in 2023 as the nonprofit cozied up with Microsoft.

english_news.title: Ukraine strikes cargo ships and admits Romania drone blast
english_news.summary: Ukraine says it struck five ships carrying illegal cargo in the Sea of Azov and in coastal waters of Russian-occupied territories.

english_news.title: Zelensky proposes face-to-face talks in open letter to Putin
english_news.summary: Ukraine's president tells the Russian leader that only "direct engagement" between the two countries could end the war, with the US focused on Iran.

english_news.title: Fury in France after child murder suspect's criminal record released
english_news.summary: A man suspected of murdering an 11-year-old girl had previously been identified as a potential child molester, records show.

english_news.title: Nearly 50 people die of thirst in Sahara desert after lorry breaks down
english_news.summary: Only two survived after trekking more than 50km (30 miles) across the desert to alert the authorities.

english_news.title: US actor James Handy stabbed to death, with girlfriend's son arrested
english_news.summary: Handy, 81, is known for his roles in films including Jumanji and Top Gun: Maverick.

english_news.title: Three jailed over heist of ancient golden helmet from Dutch museum
english_news.summary: The men are sentenced to 47 months each for stealing the 2,500-year-old Romanian Coțofenești helmet.

english_news.title: Ex-wife of Dubai ruler's nephew in custody, prosecutors say
english_news.summary: Zeynab Javadli had not been in contact with any of her friends since Tuesday.

english_news.title: US journalist pleads guilty to working as China's agent
english_news.summary: Thomas Weir Pauken II, 50, knowingly worked with people employed by the Chinese government for years.

chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报 ｜日本或通过抛售美债，为创纪录规模的日元汇市干预筹资；俞浩内部发文：未来将继续心无旁骛做实业
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

首关15亿元，英诺科创三期基金持续聚焦早期科技投资

36氪获悉，6月5日，英诺基金宣布旗下英诺科创三期基金完成首轮关账，规模15亿元。该基金聚焦早期科技投资，重点布局前沿科技及人工智能领域。

比特币“金库”公司市值蒸发620亿美元

比特币本周下跌约14%，至四个月低点附近。随着加密货6月5日下午，追觅科技创始人俞浩在公司内部大群发文，表示未来将继续心无旁骛做实业，坚持技术创新，去啃全球最难的市场。（界面）币整体滑坡，数字资产“金库型”公司的股票也持续下挫，其中许多的跌幅远远超过它们所持有的加密货币本身。Artemis的数据显示，这些比特币金库公司的完全稀释股票总市值，已从去年10月初的近期顶点近1340亿美元，降至约720亿美元，也就是减少了620亿美元。Tokenize Capital管理合伙人Tokenize Capital表示：“随着价格回落，数字资产金库公司正面临一个严峻选择：是债务违约，还是出售资产。被迫抛售已经粉碎了

chinese_news.title: Token大战中，华为云选择了第三条路｜最前线
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 邓咏仪

编辑 | 张雨忻

“在国产化算力供应受限的情况下，华为云现在不太在乎Token总量是多少，也不太在乎收入的总量是多少，在乎的是国产化的算力系统所生产出来的Tokens的健康度，并且要代表着生产力提升，而不仅仅是情绪价值。”

6月5日，2026华为云 INSPIRE 创想者大会在上海开幕，华为云CEO周跃峰表示。

他举了个例子：一个人闲来无事在手机上问 AI 一个问题，也会产生 Token，但这种 Token 的价值有多大很难说明。在他看来，衡量一朵云做得好不好，不该强调它跑出了多少万亿 Token，而该看这些 Token 替企业提了多少效率。

chinese_news.title: 中国入境游距离「世界第一」还有多远？
chinese_news.summary:
“曾有外国友人让我推荐中国的最佳旅行目的地，我的回答是：你应该看看中国的山。”

最近的一场入境游研讨会，携程集团联合创始人兼董事局主席梁建章这样回答。在他的表述中，中国有世界最高的山——喜马拉雅；全世界最美的山，则在中国南方最独特的喀斯特地貌——桂林。

与此同时，他正将这份“私藏推荐”转化为全球旅行者的实际行动。

近期，携程集团宣布了一项新的战略计划：未来五年，公司将引入2亿人次的入境游客。

在同期进行的桂林之夜入境游推广活动上，国际影星成龙也以“携程入境游大使”的身份亮相活动现场。当成龙遇上桂林山水，携程决心赋能入境游整体链条的变革正拉开序幕。

chinese_news.title: 探店13家，理想/蔚来/问界如何征服50万客群？
chinese_news.summary:
一周之内，三款“9系”旗舰SUV密集上市，高端新能源市场竞争战况升级。

5月15日，理想发布新一代L9，其中Livis版本搭载800V主动悬架、线控制动、线控转向的全线控底盘，售价50.98万元起。

5月27日，蔚来ES9与问界新M9同天发布。姚明也称“空间大”的蔚来ES9，起售价49.8万元；在高端市场已经破局的问界M9，起售价49.98万元。

冲击50万元级的高端市场，似乎已成为头部新能源车品牌的共识。这背后是战略需要，也是直接的财务驱动。

2026年一季度，理想汽车销量同比增长，但由于70%订单为L6、i6等入门车型。销量结构的下沉，让理想这家最早盈利的新造车公司再度陷入季度亏损。

蔚来则通过定价40万元级的ES8，将主力销售区间从30万元抬升至40万元级别，配合销量增长带来的规模效应，一季度亏损大幅收窄。

在新能源市场多年的配置与价格内卷下，平价入门车型的利润空间已日益稀薄。

新势力品牌纷纷向50万元级突围，不仅是品牌定位的向上攀登，更是关乎企业生

chinese_news.title: 微信AI对手机厂商打开一道窄门｜焦点分析
chinese_news.summary:
文｜王毓婵 梁键强

编辑｜张雨忻

昨日，腾讯客服回应称，微信正在与华为、小米、荣耀、OPPO、vivo等手机厂商合作推出A2A助手能力，目前已有多家厂商完成接入。

“您可以通过对应手机系统的AI助手发起微信音视频通话或向指定好友发送消息。该功能基于A2A（Agent-to-Agent）协作机制，数据安全与隐私通过双重授权机制保障。合作旨在将微信高频沟通功能融入手机系统助手，为您提供更便捷的使用体验。”腾讯客服表示。

与之前字节跳动推出的豆包手机相比，腾讯的微信AI采取了完全不同的技术路径。

以豆包手机为代表的很多 OS 端 AI 助手，走的是 GUI agent（图形界面智能体） 路线——它们像人一样通过“读屏”来识别界面，再通过“模拟点击”去操作微信。

而腾讯此次与手机厂商的合作，采用了A2A（Agent-to-Agent）机制——微信打

chinese_news.title: 前华为员工创业线控底盘，曾参编国标，获松禾、苏高新投资丨36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者丨欧雪

编辑丨袁斯来

硬氪获悉，线控底盘核心零部件供应商毫秒智控已于近期完成数千万元天使+轮融资，本轮投资方为松禾资本和苏高新融晟。这也是公司成立仅一年以来，继获得厚雪资本天使轮独家投资后，接连完成的第二轮融资。

毫秒智控2025年4月成立于上海，专注于线控转向（SBW）系统及核心电控部件的研发与生产。

毫秒智控的核心竞争力，源于其极度稀缺的团队基因。创始人兼 CEO李杰是线控转向新国标修订的联合牵头人，在集度汽车任职期间作为企业方核心代表，全程深度参与了标准的制定工作，履历完整覆盖上汽、蔚来、华为、集度所代表的传统转型、新势力崛起、科技赋能及前沿探索等产业关键发展阶段。其核心团队在集度时期开发的线控转向系统已完成超5万公里自动驾驶实测，是国内唯一具备该实测里程的团队。

硬氪了解到，线控转向（Steering-By-Wire, SBW）彻底取消了方向盘与转向机构之间的机械连接，完全依赖电信号控制。作为L3级以上高阶自动驾驶的“神经中枢”，其响应速度、操控精度和布局灵活性远超传统电动助力转

chinese_news.title: 硬氪独家 | 唐文斌「原力灵机」并购物流机器人公司，并获智谱、商汤、阶跃等投资
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 邱晓芬

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪独家获悉，具身智能企业「原力灵机」近期完成新一轮融资，资方主要为数家大模型公司，包括智谱、阶跃星辰、商汤科技。此外，华勤、上汽恒旭等产业投资方持续加注。

「原力灵机」是一家通用具身大模型公司，2025年3月由旷视科技联合创始人兼CTO唐文斌创立，团队核心创始成员为旷视科技原班人马。

有意思的是，此次融资也是商汤、旷视这两家曾经的对手，在具身智能的热潮中罕见“会师”；

另外，算上A+轮独家领投的阿里，这也是具身智能赛道罕见同时聚齐国内四家大模型厂商——此前，智谱仅通过Z基金小范围投资具身智能领域，阶跃星辰则几乎未出手具身智能。

而这一集体动作也释放出一个信号，当大模型竞争的主战从T

chinese_news.title: 为什么库里没有选择安踏？
chinese_news.summary:
文｜贺哲馨

编辑｜乔芊

2026年6月2日，NBA现役金州勇士队球星斯蒂芬·库里（Stephen Curry）在其个人社交媒体上宣布，个人品牌“库里品牌”（Curry Brand）将与李宁正式签约。

ESPN援引知情人士称，这份合同有效期长达十年，内容涵盖篮球产品、运动休闲服饰、库里以个人品牌签约运动员的权利，以及完整的高尔夫球杆产品线，合同具体金额未披露。

李宁由此成为库里自2025年11月结束与安德玛（Under Armour）十二年合作之后的新东家。值得注意的是，在李宁之前，安踏也曾与库里方面有过接触，也有一度达成合作的传言，但最终未能成型。有媒体推测，除了报价之外，真正让天平倾向李宁的是后者愿意给出的自主权，这是一个比金额更难复制的筹码。

这其实非常符合库里“不选主流品牌”的一贯逻辑。十三年前，库里没有与耐克续约，转投了当时还是运动品牌“新秀”的安德玛（Under Armour）。一个被反复讲述的版本是：耐克旗下明星众多，在那场著名的提案会上，对方读

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $62,500 by June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC crashed to $60K on strong May jobs data (172K payrolls) signaling Fed rate hike risk; recovery above $62.5K would confirm bullish reversal and sentiment shift.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk live updates, CNBC jobs data, Bitcoin technical support levels

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed cut rates at least once before December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: May payrolls beat forecasts dramatically, raising near-term rate-hike odds; market now pricing Fed holds through summer, making a cut-by-year-end bet increasingly binary.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC jobs report, Fed futures curve, CoinDesk macro analysis

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Alphabet's 2026 capex reach or exceed $190 billion?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Alphabet explicitly guided to up to $190B capex this year (double 2025), now seeking fresh capital; investor appetite test directly linked to execution risk.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC Alphabet capex announcement, Q2 2026 earnings guidance

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Boeing 737 Max production hit 52 jets/month by September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: CEO committed to July 6 assembly-line launch; this is a hard, measurable operational target with delivery visibility in airline/supply-chain data.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC Boeing announcement, FAA production reports, airline order backlogs

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will XRP trade above $2.00 at any point before August 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: XRP crashed toward $1.10 on liquidation wave; bull case hinges on regulatory clarity (Ripple lawsuit progress) or broader crypto momentum; high volatility favors binary bets.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk XRP price, Ripple legal filings, crypto liquidation data

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Zcash (ZEC) price recover to above $50 before December 31, 2026, following the Orchard Pool counterfeiting vulnerability disclosure?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap historical price data (daily close)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Market is panic-selling on the flaw; if the new shielded pool launch executes cleanly and privacy narrative rebounds, ZEC could stage significant recovery. Sentiment is at cycle lows.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Arthur Hayes' public ZEC dump, bearish bet record highs, Zcash dev roadmap for remediation pool launch

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the U.S. healthcare sector (XLV ETF) outperform the tech sector (XLK ETF) in total return through June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance or Bloomberg XLV vs. XLK cumulative return comparison
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC reports massive call buying in XLV (5,300 calls vs. 1,000 puts); rotation thesis is real but underpriced because tech (Mag 7) momentum still dominates sentiment. Clean sector trade.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: XLV call/put ratio, Dow record highs on non-tech stocks, healthcare stock momentum

market_questions_to_create.question: Will JPMorgan and Citi's Clearing House launch a live tokenized deposit network by June 30, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Clearing House official announcement, WSJ follow-up reporting, banking press releases
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Cointelegraph reported 2027 target; this is institutional adoption infrastructure that crypto markets underestimate. Execution risk is real but market pricing is near-zero.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: JPMorgan, Citi investor calls Q2 2026, Clearing House press releases, Fed CBDC policy shifts

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Lululemon's stock recover to trade above its May 2026 levels by March 31, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Yahoo Finance closing price on or near March 31, 2027; baseline is May 2026 closing price
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CNBC reports weak guidance, negative media, product miss; but Lululemon has history of bouncing back from inventory cycles. Near-term pain but long-term recovery is plausible.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Lululemon FY 2026 guidance cut, product launch failures, brand sentiment surveys, comparable-store sales trends Q3–Q4 2026

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the House pass restrictions on lawmakers' participation in prediction markets before August 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: House.gov bill tracking, Clerk's office vote records, Cointelegraph follow-up reporting
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Cointelegraph reports GOP summer vote target; this directly impacts Polymarket/Kalshi regulatory tail risk and congressional trading surveillance. Passing odds higher than market perceives.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: House GOP summer legislative calendar, Rules Committee scheduling, Clarity Act sponsor statements, SEC/CFTC testimony on prediction market disclosure

investment_theses.thesis: USD strength (DXY) will persist through Q2 2026 as Fed rate-hike expectations rise on hot jobs data, dragging down BTC and emerging-market-linked crypto assets.
supporting_signals: May payrolls 172K vs. 80K expected (CNBC); signals Fed hold or hike, not cut
BTC crashed to $60K on jobs data release (CoinDesk)
DXY implied rate expectations rising; carry-trade unwinding visible in XRP, altcoin liquidations
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed may signal dovishness in Powell's next appearance or inflation data softens, reversing rate-hike expectations quickly and reflating risk assets.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY via UUP ETF or USD/JPY pair; short BTC spot or BTC perpetuals; reduce ETH/BTC ratio via ETH short or BTC long

investment_theses.thesis: Alphabet's $190B capex commitment signals mega-cap AI arms-race desperation; the stock will continue underperforming as capital intensity concerns outweigh near-term margin recovery.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Alphabet capex doubled to $190B, now seeking fresh capital (equity dilution risk)
Alphabet 4-week losing streak cited in headline; technical breakdown suggests institutional rotation
SoftBank CEO comments on AI superintelligence arriving sooner than 10 years, raising capex bar across industry
investment_theses.counter_view: Markets may suddenly value capex as competitive moat; NVDA chip cycle strength and data-center upside could surprise, lifting mega-cap cloud spending into growth repricing.
investment_theses.expression: Underweight GOOGL vs. SPY; long NVDA or MU (chip suppliers to Alphabet) as beneficiaries; consider short GOOGL 3–6 month call spreads

investment_theses.thesis: Privacy-coin collapse (Zcash Orchard flaw + regulatory headwinds) will accelerate shift of retail hedge-demand into Bitcoin and Ethereum, supporting BTC/ETH ratio strength.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: Arthur Hayes dumped ZEC after counterfeiting vulnerability; bearish ZEC bets at record highs
Zcash requires new shielded pool (execution risk, further sell-off likely)
Regulatory scrutiny of privacy coins increasing (U.S. legislator focus on prediction markets suggests broader compliance crackdown)
investment_theses.counter_view: Privacy coins have institutional demand from darknet/sanctions-evasion flows; regulatory FUD may stabilize price quickly, and Zcash fix could prove adequate.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC/ZEC pair trade (via spot or perpetuals); long ETH/ZEC; avoid ZEC directly; consider XMR as privacy-coin hedge if institutional tail-risk real

investment_theses.thesis: Healthcare sector (XLV) rotation is real but crowded; near-term outperformance vs. tech is already priced into 5,300-call heavy options positioning; rebalance risk in June will reverse the trade.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 5,300 XLV calls vs. 1,000 puts (5:1 ratio); extreme skew signals crowding
Dow record highs on non-tech names, but breadth may be shallow
Tech Mag 7 still commands option vol; rebalancing at quarter-end (June 30) will favor momentum rotation back to large cap
investment_theses.counter_view: Healthcare fundamentals (aging demographics, biotech M&A cycle) are genuinely improving; XLV could sustain relative outperformance longer if growth fears persist.
investment_theses.expression: Long XLK (tech) call spreads vs. short XLV calls; or pair trade: long NVDA, short large-cap pharma (PFE, JNJ); or use QQQ vs. IYH ratio futures

investment_theses.thesis: Boeing's July 6 Max assembly-line launch is a key near-term catalyst; production ramp success will unlock equity and credit upside, making BAC/BA pairs attractive ahead of execution risk clarity.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Boeing CEO committed to 52 jets/month target by July 6 launch; FAA oversight and supply-chain bottlenecks create binary outcome
Airlines desperate for Max capacity; order backlog is real and incentivizes Boeing execution
Geopolitical risk (Ukraine, defense spending) supports aerospace tailwinds into 2026–2027
investment_theses.counter_view: Supply chain disruptions or production quality issues could delay ramp; if Max fails to hit 52/month, stock will crater and credit spreads will widen sharply.
investment_theses.expression: Long BA stock or BA call spreads (target July 2026 earnings beat); pair trade: long BA, short spirit aerosystems (SPR) or Collins Aerospace (RTX) to isolate Boeing execution; or BA credit: long BA bonds vs. short HY index
